name: Todoist
description: Todoist is a task and project management API that enables agents to create, update, and organize tasks and projects. Use this API to manage your to-do lists, set priorities, and track project progress programmatically.

capabilities.name: list_tasks
capabilities.description: Retrieve all tasks or filter by project, label, or status.

capabilities.name: create_task
capabilities.description: Create a new task with optional description, due date, priority, and project assignment.

capabilities.name: update_task
capabilities.description: Update an existing task's content, description, due date, priority, or labels.

capabilities.name: list_projects
capabilities.description: Retrieve all projects in your workspace.

capabilities.name: create_project
capabilities.description: Create a new project with optional description and shared members.

capabilities.name: list_labels
capabilities.description: Retrieve all labels available in your workspace for organizing tasks.
